name: Tee Box Aventura
address: 601 N Federal Hwy Unit 211-213, Hallandale Beach, FL 33009
about: Tee Box Aventura is an indoor golf training studio and simulator facility located in Hallandale Beach, Florida. The venue is set to open in Spring 2026 and will utilize TrackMan technology for swing analysis and simulation. It offers a comprehensive range of services including personalized coaching, professional club fittings, fitness programs, and facilities for group events. The space is designed to provide a community-oriented environment for golfers to train, compete, and improve their game year-round, regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade TrackMan technology provides precise swing data and video analysis
Comprehensive coaching programs that include physical assessments and personalized fitness plans
Flexible indoor facility allowing for practice and play in any weather
Community-focused environment with leagues and events for golfers of all levels
On-demand coaching and practice modes for continuous improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service available
No information on alcohol service available

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar and camera system with Optically Enhanced Radar Tracking (OERT)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and the venue also offers professional club fittings to help you find the perfect clubs for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no specific information about outside food and drink policies. The facility appears to focus on golf training rather than dining services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With TrackMan technology and various game modes, 18 holes can typically be played in about 1.5-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Box offers youth programs and a welcoming environment for juniors to learn the game without feeling rushed, making it suitable for young golfers.
